- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Requirements are clear: React app with Tailwind, Framer Motion for local services platform

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Vite React TS project scaffolded, dependencies added

- [x] Customize the Project
	Components created: Navbar, Hero, Categories, FeaturedBusinesses, WhyChooseUs, Testimonials, Footer. Home page assembled.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions needed

- [x] Compile the Project
	Dependencies installed, build successful, no errors

- [x] Create and Run Task
	npm run dev executed, dev server running

- [x] Launch the Project
	Dev server launched on http://localhost:5173/

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md updated with project information

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
